name: TAC HL

description.consumer:
Your geyser. On your schedule.

The TAC HL puts your heavy appliances — water heater, pump, high-power loads — on a smart switch rated for the job. Set schedules, automate by presence, or control remotely. Same simplicity, for serious loads.
description.technical:
A single-button Zigbee smart switch rated for heavy electrical loads up to 20A — designed for direct control of geysers, water heaters, pumps, and other high-power appliances.

Backlit with customizable icon. Available in PP or anti-glare glass in black, white, or gold.

Key Specifications
- Buttons: 1
- Relay: 20A
- Load: Geysers, heaters, pumps
- Protocol: Zigbee 3.0
- Materials: PP or AG glass
- Colours: Black, White, Gold
- Installation: Wall-mounted

⚠ Heavy load application. Proper cable sizing, circuit protection, and qualified installation are required.

specs.summary: Input Voltage: 110–240V AC 50/60Hz | Communication Protocol: Zigbee | Product Size: 86 × 86 × 10.5 mm | Bottom Shell Depth: 28mm | Installation: 86 mounting box (depth >50mm) | Working Temperature: -10°C to +60°C | Working Humidity: ≤95% RH (non-condensing)

limitations: Heavy load installation. Qualified installation required. Materials: PP or AG glass. Colours: Black, White, Gold.
